title: Uuirco's Crystal Optimizer
description: A lightweight Fabric mod that improves End Crystal responsiveness by removing crystal placement delay, instantly hiding broken crystals client-side, and providing configurable crystal spin speed.
body:
# Crystal Optimizer 😎

Crystal Optimizer is a lightweight Fabric client-side mod focused on making End Crystal PvP feel smoother and more responsive.

## Features

* Instant crystal placement (removes the vanilla crystal use delay)
* Client-side crystal break prediction
* Instantly hides crystals after attacking them
* Configurable crystal spin speed
* Mod Menu integration
* Lightweight and optimized

## Configuration

Open Mod Menu and click Configure.

Available settings:

* Enabled / Disabled
* Crystal Spin Speed

  * 0 = Vanilla
  * 1 = Fast
  * 2 = Very Fast
  * 3 = Extreme

Settings are automatically saved and restored after restarting Minecraft.

## Requirements

* Fabric Loader
* Fabric API
* Mod Menu (optional, for configuration)

## Compatibility

* Minecraft 1.21.11
* Fabric

## Notes

This is a client-side optimization mod. Servers do not need to install it.
